Field Tools

Field Kit

Inspection Essentials
Tools & Resources
Field Tools

Residential Cash Estimate

For homeowners without good insurance coverage. Enter the squares — get a ballpark cash price including the full residential roof system. Not a binding quote. Send it directly to the homeowner from the field.

Cash Estimate
$0
$1,100 per square · system complete
Complete System — Everything Included
  • Architectural Shingles — PABCO Premier or equivalent, Class A fire-rated
  • Synthetic Underlayment — full-roof coverage
  • Ice & Water Shield — valleys, eaves, all penetrations
  • Starter Strip — pre-cut at eaves & rakes
  • Hip & Ridge Cap — matching shingle line
  • Drip Edge — all eaves & rakes, color-matched
  • Step & Counter Flashing — new aluminum, never reused
  • Valley Metal — closed-cut or open metal where applicable
  • Pipe Boots & Vent Collars — new, paint-matched
  • Ridge Vent / Static Vents — balanced 1:300 NFA ventilation
  • Tear-Off & Haul-Off — up to 2 existing layers, dump fees included
  • Nails, Sealant & Accessories — per manufacturer spec
  • Labor & Installation — licensed & insured Red Hawk crew
  • Permit & Final Inspection — pulled per local requirements

Residential roofs only. Ballpark based on $1,100/sq system-complete rate. Final price depends on roof complexity, decking condition, code upgrades, ventilation, and material selection. Not a binding offer — always confirm with a written contract before work begins.

Commercial property? Commercial roofs require a detailed scope. Contact your Red Hawk project manager — we can have a full commercial estimate back to you within 48 hours.
